translationText: Ta, Seen, Meem.
These are the Verses of the Clarifying Book.

arabicText: لَعَلَّكَ بَٰخِعٌۭ نَّفْسَكَ أَلَّا يَكُونُوا۟ مُؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: Perhaps you will destroy yourself with grief, because they do not become believers.

arabicText: إِن نَّشَأْ نُنَزِّلْ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ ءَايَةًۭ فَظَلَّتْ أَعْنَٰقُهُمْ لَهَا خَٰضِعِينَ
translationText: If We will, We can send down upon them a sign from heaven, at which their necks will stay bent in humility.

arabicText: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن ذِكْرٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ مُحْدَثٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضِينَ
translationText: No fresh reminder comes to them from the Most Merciful, but they turn their backs at it.

arabicText: فَقَدْ كَذَّبُوا۟ فَسَيَأْتِيهِمْ أَنۢبَٰٓؤُا۟ مَا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
translationText: They have denied the truth, but soon will come to them the news of what they ridiculed.

arabicText: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ كَمْ أَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍۢ كَرِيمٍ
translationText: Have they not seen the earth, and how many beautiful pairs We produced therein?

arabicText: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: Surely in this is a sign, but most of them are not believers.
Most surely, your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful.

arabicText: وَإِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبُّكَ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱئْتِ ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
translationText: Your Lord called to Moses, "Go to the tyrannical people.
The people of Pharaoh. Will they not fear?"

arabicText: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ أَن يُكَذِّبُونِ
translationText: He said, "My Lord, I fear they will reject me.

arabicText: وَيَضِيقُ صَدْرِى وَلَا يَنطَلِقُ لِسَانِى فَأَرْسِلْ إِلَىٰ هَٰرُونَ
translationText: And I become stressed, and my tongue is not fluent, so send Aaron too.

arabicText: وَلَهُمْ عَلَىَّ ذَنۢبٌۭ فَأَخَافُ أَن يَقْتُلُونِ
translationText: And they have a charge against me, so I fear they will kill me."

arabicText: قَالَ كَلَّا ۖ فَٱذْهَبَا بِـَٔايَٰتِنَآ ۖ إِنَّا مَعَكُم مُّسْتَمِعُونَ
translationText: He said, "No. Go, both of you, with Our proofs. We will be with you, listening.

arabicText: فَأْتِيَا فِرْعَوْنَ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولُ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
translationText: Go to Pharaoh, and say, 'We are the Messengers of the Lord of the Worlds.
Let the Children of Israel go with us.'"

arabicText: قَالَ أَلَمْ نُرَبِّكَ فِينَا وَلِيدًۭا وَلَبِثْتَ فِينَا مِنْ عُمُرِكَ سِنِينَ
translationText: He said, "Did we not raise you among us as a child, and you stayed among us for many of your years?

arabicText: وَفَعَلْتَ فَعْلَتَكَ ٱلَّتِى فَعَلْتَ وَأَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ
translationText: And you committed that deed you committed, and you were ungrateful."

arabicText: قَالَ فَعَلْتُهَآ إِذًۭا وَأَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
translationText: He said, "I did it then, when I was of those astray.

arabicText: فَفَرَرْتُ مِنكُمْ لَمَّا خِفْتُكُمْ فَوَهَبَ لِى رَبِّى حُكْمًۭا وَجَعَلَنِى مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
translationText: And I fled from you when I feared you; but my Lord gave me wisdom, and made me one of the messengers.

arabicText: وَتِلْكَ نِعْمَةٌۭ تَمُنُّهَا عَلَىَّ أَنْ عَبَّدتَّ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
translationText: Is that the favor you taunt me with, although you have enslaved the Children of Israel?"
Pharaoh said, "And what is the Lord of the Worlds?"

arabicText: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
translationText: He said, "The Lord of the heavens and the earth, and everything between them, if you are aware."
He said to those around him, "Do you not hear?"
He said, "Your Lord and the Lord of your ancestors of old."

arabicText: قَالَ إِنَّ رَسُولَكُمُ ٱلَّذِىٓ أُرْسِلَ إِلَيْكُمْ لَمَجْنُونٌۭ
translationText: He said, "This messenger of yours, who is sent to you, is crazy."

arabicText: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
translationText: He said, "Lord of the East and the West, and everything between them, if you understand."

arabicText: قَالَ لَئِنِ ٱتَّخَذْتَ إِلَٰهًا غَيْرِى لَأَجْعَلَنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمَسْجُونِينَ
translationText: He said, "If you accept any god other than me, I will make you a prisoner."
He said, "What if I bring you something convincing?"

arabicText: قَالَ فَأْتِ بِهِۦٓ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
translationText: He said, "Bring it, if you are being truthful."

arabicText: فَأَلْقَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ ثُعْبَانٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
translationText: So he cast his staff; and it was a serpent, plain to see.

arabicText: وَنَزَعَ يَدَهُۥ فَإِذَا هِىَ بَيْضَآءُ لِلنَّٰظِرِينَ
translationText: And he pulled his hand; and it was white, for all to see.

arabicText: قَالَ لِلْمَلَإِ حَوْلَهُۥٓ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَسَٰحِرٌ عَلِيمٌۭ
translationText: He said to the dignitaries around him, "This is a skilled magician.

arabicText: يُرِيدُ أَن يُخْرِجَكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِۦ فَمَاذَا تَأْمُرُونَ
translationText: He intends to drive you out of your land with his magic, so what do you recommend?"

arabicText: قَالُوٓا۟ أَرْجِهْ وَأَخَاهُ وَٱبْعَثْ فِى ٱلْمَدَآئِنِ حَٰشِرِينَ
translationText: They said, "Delay him and his brother, and send recruiters to the cities.
To bring you every experienced magician."
So the magicians were gathered for the appointment on a specified day.
And it was said to the people, "Are you all gathered?

arabicText: لَعَلَّنَا نَتَّبِعُ ٱلسَّحَرَةَ إِن كَانُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْغَٰلِبِينَ
translationText: That we may follow the magicians, if they are the winners."

arabicText: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ قَالُوا۟ لِفِرْعَوْنَ أَئِنَّ لَنَا لَأَجْرًا إِن كُنَّا نَحْنُ ٱلْغَٰلِبِينَ
translationText: When the magicians arrived, they said to Pharaoh, "Is there a reward for us, if we are the winners?"

arabicText: قَالَ نَعَمْ وَإِنَّكُمْ إِذًۭا لَّمِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ
translationText: He said, "Yes, and you will be among those favored."

arabicText: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰٓ أَلْقُوا۟ مَآ أَنتُم مُّلْقُونَ
translationText: Moses said to them, "Present what you intend to present."

arabicText: فَأَلْقَوْا۟ حِبَالَهُمْ وَعِصِيَّهُمْ وَقَالُوا۟ بِعِزَّةِ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّا لَنَحْنُ ٱلْغَٰلِبُونَ
translationText: So they threw their ropes and their sticks, and said, "By the majesty of Pharaoh, we will be the winners."

arabicText: فَأَلْقَىٰ مُوسَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ تَلْقَفُ مَا يَأْفِكُونَ
translationText: Then Moses threw his staff, and behold, it began swallowing their trickery.
And the magicians fell down prostrating.
They said, "We have believed in the Lord of the Worlds.
The Lord of Moses and Aaron."

arabicText: قَالَ ءَامَنتُمْ لَهُۥ قَبْلَ أَنْ ءَاذَنَ لَكُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَكُمُ ٱلسِّحْرَ فَلَسَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ ۚ لَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيْدِيَكُمْ وَأَرْجُلَكُم مِّنْ خِلَٰفٍۢ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
translationText: He said, "Did you believe in Him before I have given you permission? He must be your chief, who taught you magic. You will soon know. I will cut off your hands and feet on opposite sides, and I will crucify you all."

arabicText: قَالُوا۟ لَا ضَيْرَ ۖ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا مُنقَلِبُونَ
translationText: They said, "No problem. To our Lord we will return.

arabicText: إِنَّا نَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لَنَا رَبُّنَا خَطَٰيَٰنَآ أَن كُنَّآ أَوَّلَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: We are eager for our Lord to forgive us our sins, since we are the first of the believers."

arabicText: ۞ وَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِىٓ إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
translationText: And We inspired Moses: "Travel with My servants by night. You will be followed."
Pharaoh sent heralds to the cities.
"These are a small gang.
And they are enraging us.
But we are a vigilant multitude."
So We drove them out of gardens and springs.
And treasures and noble dwellings.
So it was. And We made the Children of Israel inherit them.
And they pursued them at sunrise.

arabicText: فَلَمَّا تَرَٰٓءَا ٱلْجَمْعَانِ قَالَ أَصْحَٰبُ مُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّا لَمُدْرَكُونَ
translationText: When the two groups sighted each other, the followers of Moses said, "We are being overtaken."

arabicText: قَالَ كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّ مَعِىَ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ
translationText: He said, "No; my Lord is with me, He will guide me."

arabicText: فَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱضْرِب بِّعَصَاكَ ٱلْبَحْرَ ۖ فَٱنفَلَقَ فَكَانَ كُلُّ فِرْقٍۢ كَٱلطَّوْدِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
translationText: We inspired Moses: "Strike the sea with your staff." Whereupon it parted, and each part was like a huge hill.
And there We brought the others near.
And We saved Moses and those with him, all together.
Then We drowned the others.

arabicText: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: In that there is a sign, but most of them are not believers.
Surely, your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful.
And relate to them the story of Abraham.

arabicText: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ
translationText: When he said to his father and his people, "What do you worship?"

arabicText: قَالُوا۟ نَعْبُدُ أَصْنَامًۭا فَنَظَلُّ لَهَا عَٰكِفِينَ
translationText: They said, "We worship idols, and we remain devoted to them."
He said, "Do they hear you when you pray?
Or do they benefit you, or harm you?"

arabicText: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا كَذَٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ
translationText: They said, "But we found our ancestors doing so."
He said, "Have you considered what you worship.
You and your ancient ancestors?

arabicText: فَإِنَّهُمْ عَدُوٌّۭ لِّىٓ إِلَّا رَبَّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
translationText: They are enemies to me, but not so the Lord of the Worlds.
He who created me, and guides me.
He who feeds me, and waters me.
And when I get sick, He heals me.
He who makes me die, and then revives me.

arabicText: وَٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لِى خَطِيٓـَٔتِى يَوْمَ ٱلدِّينِ
translationText: He who, I hope, will forgive my sins on the Day of the Reckoning."

arabicText: رَبِّ هَبْ لِى حُكْمًۭا وَأَلْحِقْنِى بِٱلصَّٰلِحِينَ
translationText: "My Lord! Grant me wisdom, and include me with the righteous.

arabicText: وَٱجْعَل لِّى لِسَانَ صِدْقٍۢ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرِينَ
translationText: And give me a reputation of truth among the others.
And make me of the inheritors of the Garden of Bliss.

arabicText: وَٱغْفِرْ لِأَبِىٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
translationText: And forgive my father-he was one of the misguided.
And do not disgrace me on the Day they are resurrected.

arabicText: يَوْمَ لَا يَنفَعُ مَالٌۭ وَلَا بَنُونَ
translationText: The Day when neither wealth nor children will help.

arabicText: إِلَّا مَنْ أَتَى ٱللَّهَ بِقَلْبٍۢ سَلِيمٍۢ
translationText: Except for him who comes to God with a sound heart."
And Paradise will be brought near for the righteous.
And the Blaze will be displayed to the deviators.

arabicText: وَقِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ
translationText: And it will be said to them, "Where are those you used to worship?"

arabicText: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ هَلْ يَنصُرُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَنتَصِرُونَ
translationText: Besides God? Can they help you, or help themselves?"
Then they will be toppled into it, together with the seducers.
And the soldiers of Satan, all of them.
They will say, as they feud in it.

arabicText: تَٱللَّهِ إِن كُنَّا لَفِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ مُّبِينٍ
translationText: "By God, We were in evident error.
For equating you with the Lord of the Worlds.
No one misled us except the sinners.
Now we have no intercessors.
And no sincere friend.

arabicText: فَلَوْ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةًۭ فَنَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: If only we could have another chance, we would be among the faithful."

arabicText: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: Surely in this is a sign, but most of them are not believers.
Your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful.
The people of Noah disbelieved the messengers.

arabicText: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
translationText: Their brother Noah said to them, "Do you not fear?
I am to you a faithful messenger.
So fear God, and obey me.

arabicText: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
translationText: I ask of you no payment for this. My payment is only from the Lord of the Worlds.
So fear God, and obey me."
They said, "Shall we believe in you, when it is the lowliest who follow you?"

arabicText: قَالَ وَمَا عِلْمِى بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
translationText: He said, "What do I know about what they do?

arabicText: إِنْ حِسَابُهُمْ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّى ۖ لَوْ تَشْعُرُونَ
translationText: Their account rests only with my Lord, if you have sense.
And I am not about to drive away the believers.
I am only a clear warner."

arabicText: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَٰنُوحُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمَرْجُومِينَ
translationText: They said, "If you do not refrain, O Noah, you will be stoned."
He said, "My Lord, my people have denied me.

arabicText: فَٱفْتَحْ بَيْنِى وَبَيْنَهُمْ فَتْحًۭا وَنَجِّنِى وَمَن مَّعِىَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: So judge between me and them decisively, and deliver me and the believers who are with me.

arabicText: فَأَنجَيْنَٰهُ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ
translationText: So We delivered him and those with him in the laden Ark.
Then We drowned the rest.

arabicText: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: In that is a sign, but most of them are not believers.
Your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful.
Aad disbelieved the messengers.

arabicText: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ هُودٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
translationText: When their brother Hud said to them, "Do you not fear?
I am to you a faithful messenger.
So fear God, and obey me.

arabicText: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
translationText: I ask of you no payment for this. My payment is only from the Lord of the Worlds.
Do you build a monument on every height for vanity's sake?
And you set up fortresses, hoping to live forever?
And when you strike, you strike mercilessly?
So fear God, and obey me.
And reverence Him, who supplied you with everything you know.
He supplied you with livestock and children.
And gardens and springs.

arabicText: إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍۢ
translationText: I fear for you the punishment of an awesome Day."

arabicText: قَالُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْنَآ أَوَعَظْتَ أَمْ لَمْ تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلْوَٰعِظِينَ
translationText: They said, "It is the same for us, whether you lecture us, or do not lecture.
This is nothing but morals of the ancients.
And we will not be punished."

arabicText: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَهْلَكْنَٰهُمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: So they denied him, and We destroyed them. Surely in this is a sign, but most of them are not believers.
Your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful.
Thamood disbelieved the messengers.

arabicText: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ صَٰلِحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
translationText: When their brother Saleh said to them, "Do you not fear?
I am to you a faithful messenger.
So fear God, and obey me.

arabicText: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
translationText: I ask of you no payment for it. My payment is only from the Lord of the Worlds.
Will you be left secure in what is here?
In gardens and springs?
And fields, and palm-trees whose fruits are delicious?
And you skillfully carve houses in the mountains?
So fear God, and obey me.
And do not obey the command of the extravagant.

arabicText: ٱلَّذِينَ يُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ
translationText: Who spread turmoil on earth, and do not reform."
They said, "You are surely one of the bewitched.

arabicText: مَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌۭ مِّثْلُنَا فَأْتِ بِـَٔايَةٍ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
translationText: You are nothing but a man like us. So bring us a sign, if you are truthful.

arabicText: قَالَ هَٰذِهِۦ نَاقَةٌۭ لَّهَا شِرْبٌۭ وَلَكُمْ شِرْبُ يَوْمٍۢ مَّعْلُومٍۢ
translationText: He said, "This is a she-camel; she has her turn of drinking, and you have your turn of drinking-on a specified day.

arabicText: وَلَا تَمَسُّوهَا بِسُوٓءٍۢ فَيَأْخُذَكُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍۢ
translationText: And do not touch her with harm, lest the punishment of a great day seizes you."
But they slaughtered her, and became full of remorse.

arabicText: فَأَخَذَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: So the punishment overtook them. Surely in this is a sign, but most of them are not believers.
Your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful.
The people of Lot disbelieved the messengers.

arabicText: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ لُوطٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
translationText: When their brother Lot said to them, "Do you not fear?
I am to you a faithful messenger.
So fear God, and obey me.

arabicText: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
translationText: I ask of you no payment for it. My payment is only from the Lord of the Worlds.
Do you approach the males of the world?

arabicText: وَتَذَرُونَ مَا خَلَقَ لَكُمْ رَبُّكُم مِّنْ أَزْوَٰجِكُم ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ عَادُونَ
translationText: And forsake the wives your Lord created for you? Indeed, you are intrusive people."

arabicText: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَٰلُوطُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْرَجِينَ
translationText: They said, "Unless you refrain, O Lot, you will be expelled."
He said, "I certainly deplore your conduct."
"My Lord, save me and my family from what they do."
So We saved him and his family, altogether.
Except for an old woman among those who tarried.
Then We destroyed the others.

arabicText: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًۭا ۖ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
translationText: And We rained down on them a rain. Dreadful is the rain of those forewarned.

arabicText: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: Surely in this is a sign, but most of them are not believers.
Your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful.
The People of the Woods disbelieved the messengers.

arabicText: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ شُعَيْبٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
translationText: When Shuaib said to them, "Do you not fear?
I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
So fear God, and obey me.

arabicText: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
translationText: I ask of you no payment for it. My payment is only from the Lord of the Worlds.

arabicText: ۞ أَوْفُوا۟ ٱلْكَيْلَ وَلَا تَكُونُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْسِرِينَ
translationText: Give full measure, and do not cheat.
And weigh with accurate scales.

arabicText: وَلَا تَبْخَسُوا۟ ٱلنَّاسَ أَشْيَآءَهُمْ وَلَا تَعْثَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ
translationText: And do not defraud people of their belongings, and do not work corruption in the land.
And fear Him who created you and the masses of old."
They said, "You are one of those bewitched.

arabicText: وَمَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌۭ مِّثْلُنَا وَإِن نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْكَٰذِبِينَ
translationText: And you are nothing but a man like us; and we think that you are a liar.

arabicText: فَأَسْقِطْ عَلَيْنَا كِسَفًۭا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
translationText: So bring down on us pieces from the sky, if you are truthful."
He said, "My Lord is Well Aware of what you do."

arabicText: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَهُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمِ ٱلظُّلَّةِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
translationText: But they denied him. So the punishment of the day of gloom gripped them. It was the punishment of a great day.

arabicText: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: Surely in this is a sign, but most of them are not believers.
Your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful.
It is a revelation from the Lord of the Worlds.
The Honest Spirit came down with it.
Upon your heart, that you may be one of the warners.
In a clear Arabic tongue.
And it is in the scriptures of the ancients.

arabicText: أَوَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُمْ ءَايَةً أَن يَعْلَمَهُۥ عُلَمَٰٓؤُا۟ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
translationText: Is it not a sign for them that the scholars of the Children of Israel recognized it?
Had We revealed it to one of the foreigners.

arabicText: فَقَرَأَهُۥ عَلَيْهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ مُؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: And he had recited it to them, they still would not have believed in it.
Thus We make it pass through the hearts of the guilty.

arabicText: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُا۟ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ
translationText: They will not believe in it until they witness the painful punishment.
It will come to them suddenly, while they are unaware.
Then they will say, "Are we given any respite?"
Do they seek to hasten Our punishment?
Have you considered: if We let them enjoy themselves for some years.
Then there comes to them what they were promised.

arabicText: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يُمَتَّعُونَ
translationText: Of what avail to them will be their past enjoyments?

arabicText: وَمَآ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا لَهَا مُنذِرُونَ
translationText: Never did We destroy a town, but it had warners.
As a reminder-We are never unjust.
It was not the devils that revealed it.
It is not in their interests, nor in their power.
They are barred from hearing.

arabicText: فَلَا تَدْعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُعَذَّبِينَ
translationText: So do not pray to another god with God, else you will be of those tormented.
And warn your close relatives.

arabicText: وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: And lower your wing to those of the believers who follow you.

arabicText: فَإِنْ عَصَوْكَ فَقُلْ إِنِّى بَرِىٓءٌۭ مِّمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
translationText: And if they disobey you, say, "I am innocent of what you do."
And put your trust in the Almighty, the Merciful.
He Who sees you when you rise.
And your devotions amidst the worshipers.
He is indeed the Hearer, the Aware.

arabicText: هَلْ أُنَبِّئُكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَن تَنَزَّلُ ٱلشَّيَٰطِينُ
translationText: Shall I inform you upon whom the devils descend?
They descend upon every sinful liar.
They give ear, and most of them are liars.
And as for the poets-the deviators follow them.

arabicText: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّهُمْ فِى كُلِّ وَادٍۢ يَهِيمُونَ
translationText: Do you not see how they ramble in every style?
And how they say what they do not do?

arabicText: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَذَكَرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ كَثِيرًۭا وَٱنتَصَرُوا۟ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا ظُلِمُوا۟ ۗ وَسَيَعْلَمُ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓا۟ أَىَّ مُنقَلَبٍۢ يَنقَلِبُونَ
translationText: Except for those who believe, and do good deeds, and remember God frequently, and defend themselves after they are wronged. As for those who do wrong, they will know by what overturning they will be overturned.
